**Clungcord — What It Is**

Clungcord is a custom, self-hosted chat app — essentially a lightweight Discord-like messaging platform built for the clung.us community. It is NOT a Discord client or bot. It's a standalone chat system with its own backend, its own WebSocket real-time layer, channels, DMs, reactions, custom emoji, pinned messages, and GitHub OAuth auth.
